ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (opening entry) — arm E29, campaign Wave 2.

GOAL: SFT a qwen3-8b LoRA single-letter pick-predictor on E24's 2018 AskUserQuestion decisions; measure whether it clears E24's difficulty floor on the SAME session-held-out eval, plus a supplemental cross-corpus transfer eval.

DATA: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/out/decisions.jsonl (2018 clean, mirror corpus). Read-only. Outputs only under E29/out/.

SPLIT (apples-to-apples w/ E24): E24 split_of — group-by-session, test iff int(sha256(session_id),16)%10==0. Reproduced offline: train 1803 / eval 215 (416 vs 48 sessions, zero straddle). Single-select subset: train 1696 / eval 202. FT is single-select only (multi-select 120 rows excluded; E24 scores multi separately and the gate is single-select).

TASK FRAMING: 5-class-per-row problem {option-0..K-1, custom}. Custom/Other (~19% of single-select eval, ~24% overall) is a real deferral class appended as an extra letter slot so the model can predict deferral. Letter classifier: emit the letter of the picked option (or the custom slot); score = softmax over first-token logprobs of each letter.

PRE-REGISTERED GATE: the FT is promising ONLY IF single-select accuracy on the 202-row E24 eval beats the floor 0.574 (always-option-0 = 116/202 = 0.5743) with a 95% CI EXCLUDING the floor, AND ECE no worse than ~0.10. E24 context: best baseline acc 0.579 (opus 0.559 — below floor), best ECE 0.026; NO baseline beat the floor. Metrics computed E24-exact: bootstrap CI (1000 resamples, seed 24), repo 15-bin confidence ECE (cc_steer.retrain.lexical.ece), multiclass + top-label Brier.

SPEND: Tinker training via pre-built harness only, --spend-cap-usd 9.0 (SpendGuard-enforced). Creds from ~/.cc-steer/tinker.env.

SHAPE-CHANGE (item #2, cross-corpus): task specified sweeping pool roots /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-*/. VERIFIED via readlink: ALL 18 acct-*/projects are symlinks resolving to the identical /Users/yasyf/.claude/projects (local, not mirror). This matches E24's own documented finding. Standing user rule forbids analyzing local ~/.claude (mirror-only). Resolution pending: report structural finding + options rather than unilaterally reading local ~/.claude.

HARNESS ADAPTATIONS (E29/bin, not repo source): e29lib.Decision.from_record → E24 schema (options=label strings, picks[0], context_digest, header folded in, custom slot appended); load_decisions filters multi_select; session_split → E24 %10 convention; train.py persists per-decision test probs (preds_test.jsonl) for re-derivable E24-exact metrics. KEEP raw per-row probs.
